SHORT NAME: LUPAIND 
LONG NAME: CLM_HHA_LUPA_IND_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
L = Low utilization payment adjustment (LUPA) claim 
Blank = Not a LUPA claim; process using home health resource groups (HHRG) 
COMMENT: 
Beginning 10/1/2000, this field was populated with data. Claims processed prior to 10/1/2000 
contained spaces.
